name: meeting-for-ai-phase-5

checklist.summary: 用户回复 pass，确认 Phase 5 checklist 可以进入 todolist 生成。确认范围包含忙碌冲突检测、advisory turn、轻量预约、任务暂停恢复、并发占用、UI 可观测性和 Phase 1-4 回归。

tested.summary: Phase 5 implementation, deterministic tests, and chrome-devtools MCP p2p browser acceptance completed. MCP p2p found and fixed the meeting detail conflict projection gap and changed Try later so reminder timing follows agent availability instead of user-entered time. Awaiting user acceptance before final done.

done.summary: 用户明确验收 Phase 5。验收范围包含确定性测试、chrome-devtools MCP p2p、真实 AI 冲突测试、busy-agent advisory turn、预计可用时间/建议展示、中文 UI 文案、取消会议状态语义修复，以及轻量稍后再试能力边界记录。

notes: Child requirement created from meeting-for-ai Phase 5.

Product clarification completed in conversation: advisory turn recommends but does not execute; medium/high risk conflicts trigger advisory by default; conflict UI prioritizes busy reason, expected availability, interruption risk, and resume notes; advisory failure allows continued user choice but force join requires second confirmation; safety is the top success criterion.
Lightweight scheduling is included only as a conflict-handling option: remind/try later or wait until available, not a full calendar or hard reservation system.
Checklist created and awaiting user confirmation before todolist generation.

2026-06-18T01:25:17+08:00 Phase 5 implementation completed: conflict-aware meeting creation, busy detection, advisory recommendation, reservation/reminder option, conflict resolution API, force-join confirmation, original work snapshot, logical pause state, idempotent terminal resume, frontend conflict panel, and focused tests.

2026-06-18T03:57:48+08:00 Follow-up fixes completed before acceptance: conflict UI enum/local fallback text localization, cancelled meeting history status no longer displays as completed, and the lightweight scheduling gap was recorded in docs/todo-task.md.
